title: Invite Guests to existing board when status updated in ANOTHER board

posts.author: SimonM (Simon Millner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I would like to use automation to invite Guests to a board based upon a pulse in a different board that contains their email and a status.

I.e. When the status changes in the pulse, then invite the email address as a guest to another board.

image1130×155 22.6 KB
